headline: Crypto Founder Nathan Allman Dies at 32

article.summary: Ondo Finance says its founder, Nathan Allman, died unexpectedly, with company president Ian De Bode to serve as CEO.

headline: Stocks Fall 2%, Oil Surges 4% on US Strike

article.title: Stocks Pare Gain, Oil Climbs as US Strikes Iran: Markets Wrap
article.summary: Stocks trimmed gains and crude oil advanced after US strikes on sites in Iran curbed optimism over a potential deal to end the war.

article.title: Treasury Curve Flashes Higher-for-Longer Warning Under Warsh
article.summary: A key Treasury yield gap shrank to its tightest level in a year as traders ramped up bets the Federal Reserve may keep interest rates higher for longer under new chairman Kevin Warsh.
